arts.ttl: Chelsea need a Douglas Luiz-type midfielder not another teenager – opinion
arts.sum: Out came the exclusive from Fabrizio reporting that Chelsea are in for a 19-year-old academy player from Manchester City, and my faith disappeared once again. It’s always risky writing these types of articles before the window has even closed just in case they do shock us all. But I have such little faith right now […]

arts.sum: West Ham have completed the loan signing of Evan Ferguson from Brighton, it has been confirmed by ExWHUEmployee. The Brighton striker joins on a loan deal for the remainder of the season, details of the agreement to follow.
